description_long: This object is a retro-style kiosk resembling a classic jukebox, featuring a prominent arched top with glowing neon-like tubes in pastel blue and purple hues. The front panel is adorned with metallic gold and green accents, a mesh speaker grille with a diamond pattern, and a central display area framed by decorative elements. The sides and rear are finished in a wood grain texture, giving it a vintage, mid-century appearance. The base and lower corners are reinforced with black and gold metallic components, adding both stability and visual contrast. The overall design is compact and upright, with no visible windows or doors, and the front is clearly intended for user interaction. This kiosk would likely serve as a decorative or interactive fixture in an urban environment, such as a themed entertainment area or retro café.
description: A retro, jukebox-inspired kiosk with glowing neon tubes, wood grain sides, and metallic gold accents, featuring a decorative front panel and compact, upright design.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the arched neon tubes, decorative grille, metallic accents, and central display area.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the curved wood grain panel and the thickness of the neon tube frame.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, continuous wood grain surface with no interactive features.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wood grain panel and neon tube curvature.
attribute_signage_type: illuminated sign integrated into the arched top, no visible text or symbols
attribute_roof_design: arched, domed top with glowing neon tubes and metallic trim
